de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult
  • Enclosing class:
    TruthValueTracingUtil

    public static class TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult
extends Object
    Represents the unmodifiable predicate results of a leaf Node (Goal).
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Term condition
      The condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
      private String conditionString
      The human readable condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
      private Node leafNode
      The leaf Node.
      private Map<String,TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult> results
      All found results.
      private Name termLabelName
      The Name of the TermLabel to consider.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult

        public TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult(Node leafNode,
                                  Map<String,TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult> results,
                                  Term condition,
                                  String conditionString,
                                  Name termLabelName)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        leafNode - The leaf Node.
        results - All found results.
        condition - The condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
        conditionString - The human readable condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
        termLabelName - The Name of the TermLabel to consider.

    • Method Detail

      • getResults

        public Map<String,TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult> getResults()
        Returns all found results.
        Returns:
        All found results.

      • getResult

        public TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult getResult(FormulaTermLabel termLabel)
        Returns the TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult for the given FormulaTermLabel.
        Parameters:
        termLabel - The FormulaTermLabel.
        Returns:
        The found TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult or null if not available.

      • updateResult

        public void updateResult(FormulaTermLabel termLabel,
                TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult result)
        Updates a result.

        Warning: TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResults are considered to be unmodifiable. This means that an update of the result needs to be done before results are shown to the user by the UI.

        Parameters:
        termLabel - The FormulaTermLabel to update.
        result - The new result of the given FormulaTermLabel.

      • getCondition

        public Term getCondition()
        Returns the condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
        Returns:
        The condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.

        public String getConditionString()
        Returns the human readable condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.
        Returns:
        The human readable condition under which the leaf Node is reached from the analyzed Node.

        public Name getTermLabelName()
        Returns the Name of the TermLabel to consider.
        Returns:
        The Name of the TermLabel to consider.

      • hasPredicateLabel

        public boolean hasPredicateLabel(Term term)
        Checks if the Term has a TermLabel with Name getTermLabelName().
        Parameters:
        term - The Term to check.
        Returns:
        true has TermLabel, false do not has TermLabel.

      • getPredicateLabel

        public FormulaTermLabel getPredicateLabel(Term term)
        Returns the first FormulaTermLabel with Name getTermLabelName().
        Parameters:
        term - The Term.
        Returns:
        The found FormulaTermLabel or null otherwise.
